scripts.bootstrap: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.build: node -e "if (process.platform === 'linux') { try { require('child_process').execSync('apk add --no-cache openssl libc6-compat', {stdio: 'inherit'}); } catch (e) {} }" && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && npm run prisma:generate --prefix server && npm run db:setup --prefix server && npm run db:seed --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
